title: opencode-wireguard-proxy config
description: Configuration for the opencode-wireguard-proxy plugin. Place this file as wireguard-proxy.jsonc in ~/.config/opencode/ (global) or .opencode/ (per-project).

binary.description: Path to wireproxy binary. Relative paths resolve from this config file's directory. Download from https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/releases (standard WireGuard) or https://github.com/bropines/awg-wireproxy/releases (AmneziaWG).

config.description: Path to wireproxy .conf file (WireGuard/AmneziaWG config with [http] section). Relative paths resolve from this config file's directory.

hosts.description: Domains to route through the WireGuard/AmneziaWG tunnel. Matching is case-insensitive. Subdomains are included automatically (e.g. 'openrouter.ai' matches 'api.openrouter.ai'). Empty array disables the plugin.

port.description: Override the proxy port. Default: read from wireproxy.conf [http] BindAddress, falls back to 25345.
